home.name: How to Get Started with Starter
home.description: Set up and explore the Sudobility architecture pattern with the Starter template project.

steps.name: Browse the Documentation
steps.text: Read the documentation page to understand the six-package architecture: types, API, client, lib, web app, and mobile app.

steps.name: Create a History Entry
steps.text: Log in and add your first history entry to see how the full-stack data flow works from frontend to backend.

steps.name: Explore the API
steps.text: Check how the Hono API with PostgreSQL and Drizzle ORM handles CRUD operations and authentication.

steps.name: Customize and Extend
steps.text: Use this template as a starting point to build your own application following the same architecture pattern.

webApp.description: A full-stack template project demonstrating the Sudobility architecture pattern with shared types, a Hono API, TanStack Query hooks, Zustand stores, and a React web app.
features: Shared type definitions across frontend and backend
TanStack Query hooks with automatic caching
